packets.generation_record_command: node tools/assets/new_generation_record.mjs --id <accepted-source-id> --project-dir <project-dir> --source-family "blank UI kit sheet" --source-family-role "<accepted role>" --accepted-source <path> --provider <provider> --model <model-or-workflow> --workflow-path <workflow.json> --prompt-packet gamedesign/projects/rune-marches/art/prompts/rune-marches-ui-map-rescue-v2-blank-ui-kit-sheet-prompt.json --seed <seed> --prompt "<prompt>" --negative-prompt "<negative prompt>"
